task_description: Phase 41 FEAT-002: Add streaming TTS module with ElevenLabs and Kokoro providers, prefetch buffer for sub-300ms latency, adaptive VAD with noise floor calibration, and pipeline integration with interruption handling.

verification.summary: typecheck clean, 89 tests passing across 11 files (641ms). Tests cover TTS factory creation, ElevenLabs mock/WS modes, Kokoro mock/HTTP modes, prefetch buffer behavior, adaptive VAD calibration, and pipeline integration.
